title: Relative masses of atoms and molecules
summary: 9701 AS — Ar, Mr, isotopes, and the carbon-12 standard.
learningObjectives: Define relative atomic and molecular mass.
Explain isotopic abundance and Ar values.

simpleExplanation.title: Comparing atom and molecule masses
simpleExplanation.summary: Chemists compare masses on a scale where carbon-12 equals 12. Formula mass sums atomic masses in a compound.
steps: Mr = sum of Ar in formula.

sections.content: **Relative masses** (2.1) feeds **2.2–2.4 mole calculations**. Always show **working with Ar/Mr values**.
